use_cases: Displaying key performance metrics in a dashboard layout
Visualizing data trends with embedded charts
Presenting statistical information in a card format
Building analytics overview sections for business applications
ai_summary: A statistics dashboard component featuring card-based layout with integrated chart visualization using Recharts. Displays quantitative metrics in a clean, modern interface suitable for analytics dashboards, KPI tracking, and business intelligence applications. Designed for SaaS platforms and data-driven interfaces with responsive layout support.
